Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}So, the Shadow controls a whole underground network...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}This is a problem. We have no means of attack.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Your notes from previous battles mentioned a Shadow that was able to take control of the monorail.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I'm guessing this Shadow must have its own body, just like that one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Let me see if I can pinpoint it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Even if we know where it is, we still have to get to it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}If it's abandoned, there may still be a way to enter the facility where the cables converge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}It's inside a small chamber underground.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}It's rectangular, so I assume it's man-made.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Is it some sort of basement?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I overheard the manager of Escapade a while back...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}He was sayin' the power supply's been acting up lately.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}There was a big outage because of it that forced him to cancel some important event.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Yeah. Mentioned they remodeled the basement into a control room a while ago.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}All right. As soon as we're ready, we'll make our move![n]{f 1 1}
